parameters.query:
WITH processed_signups_base AS (
    SELECT
        b.id AS batch_id,
        s.signup_date,
        s.member,
        s.payer,
        s.product,
        b.status AS batch_status,
        x."Address 1",
        x."Address 2",
        x."town",
        x."postcode",
        CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_parent_2026,
        CASE WHEN s.product <> '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_other_product,
        CASE WHEN s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_key
    FROM public.signup_batches AS b
    INNER JOIN public.member_signups AS s
        ON b.id = s.batch_id
    LEFT JOIN public.raw_contacts AS x
        ON s.payer = CONCAT(x."First name", ' ', x."Last name")
    WHERE b.status = 'Processing'
),
consolidated AS (
    SELECT
        MIN(batch_id) AS batch_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT batch_id) AS batch_count,
        payer,
        "Address 1",
        "Address 2",
        town,
        postcode,
        SUM(is_parent_2026) AS parent_tags,
        SUM(is_other_product) AS regular_tags,
        SUM(is_key) AS key_tags,
        COUNT(*) AS total_items
    FROM processed_signups_base
    WHERE product <> 'a. Social 2026'
    GROUP BY payer, "Address 1", "Address 2", town, postcode
)
SELECT
    batch_id,
    batch_count,
    payer,
    "Address 1",
    "Address 2",
    town,
    postcode,
    parent_tags,
    regular_tags,
    key_tags,
    total_items
FROM consolidated
ORDER BY payer, "Address 1", "Address 2", town, postcode;
